subject: [PATCH v6 07/10] dax: plumb hotplug online_type through dax

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability for drivers using dax_kmem to specify an auto-online policy when creating a DAX device. It introduces a new field, 'online_type', which can be set to override the system default online policy. The system default is preserved and can still be used by setting it explicitly. This change allows for more flexibility in handling hotplug events and ensures that the ABI remains consistent even if the system default changes over time.
